title: Bills are met. I am met.
subtitle: A three-minute release-and-allow for the bills-always-win feeling.
excerpt: A three-minute pair of energy statements for the bills-always-win loop. The story that money always leaves faster than it arrives, that each statement is another loss. Use before paying a bill batch, or when the resentment of money going out has built through the day.
sourceNotes: Release / Allow structure: The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024), chapters 2 through 5. Theme adapted from Day 3 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025), "Let go of 'bills always win' stress." The combination as a daytime reset is original to the homemade.education library.

content.text: A three-minute pair of energy statements for the bills-always-win loop. The story that money leaves faster than it arrives, that each payment is another loss. Use it before opening a bill batch, or when the weight of money going out has built through the day.

attrs.quote: I am ready to release the story that bills always win and money always leaves faster than it comes. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow the truth that bills are being met and I am being met too. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.

content.text: Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
If the allow statement lands as hollow, tap first.
clears the grip before you try to reframe it. For the moment of actually paying,
gives each payment a one-breath deliberate moment.

The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024), chapters 2 through 5. The theme is adapted from Day 3 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The combination as a daytime reset is original to the homemade.education library.
